Reviews.Author: 14gr5r4qrj
Reviews.Comment: I couldn’t be happier with Isaeva. It’s very easy to use, extremely stable, and runs perfectly without crashes or lag. The interface is lightweight, well optimized, and looks clean and professional. Script execution is great, it supports 100% UNC, and it works smoothly with Roblox without bugs. On top of that, the developers clearly work hard on it, there are frequent updates with constant improvements and fixes. Overall, Isaeva feels polished, reliable, and well made. Definitely a great choice.

Categories.Comment: I’m really happy with Isaeva. It runs scripts well and has 100% sUNC. It’s very stable and works great. If you’re looking for a wellmade executor, Isaeva is the right choice. 🔥
Couldn’t be happier with it. The interface uses only 70 MB and is very optimized. It couldn’t be better. The same goes for Roblox, it has no bugs and works perfectly.
The stability is perfect as well. I’ve never had a crash or a moment where I thought it was laggy. Isaeva works perfectly.
It’s very easy to use, and the design is well optimized and smooth. It looks great and professional.
It has great developers who work hard on it, and there are often updates. They regularly add improvements and fixes, which shows they really care about keeping it stable, smooth, and up to date.

Categories.Comment: Script support is a hit or miss; it either crashes because there is no support or works flawlessly. Unsure about script performance with executor itself.
The executor UI is extremely fucking laggy for whatever reason; in-game works fine and resource usage is comparable to any others with either marginal gain or decrease. in memory.

Multi-instancing, specifically automated with the launcher, is extremely broken and won't allow for launching more than one instance at a time or just won't multi-instance properly at all, I assume due to not killing Roblox's singleton event handle properly.
It looks pretty sexy and does what Nihon and Zenith did but not half-assed.
Very good, frequent updates, consistent.
